Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.comstock_building_type" AS comstock_building_type, date_trunc('month', date_add('second', -900, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.timestamp)) AS timestamp, count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS sample_count, (count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(1) / CAST(count(DISTINCT (bs.bldg_id, bs."in.nhgis_tract_gisjoin", bs.state)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id AND bs.state = comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.upgrade = 1 AND comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state = 'CO' AND (comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.bldg_id, comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_ts_by_state.state) IN (SELECT bs.bldg_id, bs.state 
FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs 
WHERE bs.upgrade IN (1, 2) AND bs.applicability = true GROUP BY bs.bldg_id, bs.state 
HAVING count(distinct(bs.upgrade)) = 2) AND bs.state = 'CO' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/02805358e05bc3d836bdc164bfe1d6a654b46688587369a27332a5ca17e8d150/c74f93f0-2da4-4f62-b4cc-bca08ecf8653/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
